slides.headline: Spotting a Chapter 31 Scenario Quickly
slides.body: Identify key signals to streamline your compliance review.

slides.headline: Review the VA Form 22-1999
slides.body: Check for the 'Special Educational Benefits' section.
bullets: Look for 'Chapter 31' listed as an educational benefit.
Verify if the student has a Vocational Rehabilitation (VR) claim.

slides.headline: Understand the 85/15 Rule
slides.body: Determine if the student is a Voc Rehab recipient.
bullets: Check if the student qualifies under the 85/15 rule.
Confirm if the Voc Rehab benefit is a primary educational benefit.

slides.headline: Look for VR Eligibility Indicators
slides.body: Identify if the student has a VR claim.
bullets: Check for 'VR Eligible' in the student's profile.
Look for 'VR Claim Status' indicating an active claim.

slides.headline: Consult Your SAA Letter
slides.body: Refer to your State Approving Agency (SAA) guidance.
bullets: Read the SAA letter for specific instructions.
Look for clarifications on Chapter 31 scenarios.

slides.headline: Make a Decision
slides.body: Determine if the student qualifies for Voc Rehab benefits.
bullets: Refer to the relevant VA guidance for detailed instructions.
Make sure the student meets all eligibility criteria.

outline.caption: Identify key signals to streamline your compliance review. Learn to spot Chapter 31 scenarios quickly and ensure student veterans receive the appropriate benefits.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is the first one, which could benefit from a more engaging headline to capture attention. The top fix would be to add a more compelling headline that highlights the urgency or importance of the information.
